notes:
## 1.7.4

## What's new

- **Family pause actually opens the kid phone** — Steady Home unlocks apps when parent taps Pause all kids (was stuck looking locked).
- **Parent remote on the home screen** — Pause 30 / 60 min + End pause right on Parent home; Send rules reports real success/fail.
- **Refresh feels real** — spinner + “Refreshing…” while sync runs on parent and kid.
- **Kid to-do button** — checklist icon next to Refresh; kid taps “I did it”, parent Approves on their phone.
- **Tighter security** — Privacy → Accessibility / “Steady has full access” bounced even mid-navigation; Device Owner keeps shade/settings locks during family pause.
- Live location keeps updating during family pause.

## Update tip

Install on **both** phones. On parent: Pause all kids · 30 min — kid home should show Family pause / open apps within a few seconds. Try Refresh and watch the spinner.
